title: 'Star Trek: Strange New Worlds' fourth season takes big swings - Engadget
summary: Even when Star Trek: Strange New Worlds is good, you're left with the nagging feeling that it could have been better. The sixth episode, in particular, isn't just a series standout, it's one of the best episodes across Trek's six-decade history.
